---
applyTo: "src/ui/**/*.cpp,src/ui/**/*.h"
---

# UI instructions

- Favor clarity and readability over flashy effects.
- Use simple panels, lists, buttons, tooltips, and status strips.
- The UI should evoke retro strategy/RPG readability.
- Show time/date/gold prominently.
- Overworld UI should clearly show destination, travel time, and whether a destination enters location mode.
- Battle UI must clearly show:
  - turn order
  - active unit
  - HP/MP/Life
  - action menu
  - target selection
- Keep placeholder UI art minimal and functional.
